code_examples.title: Complete ETL Connector Business Rule - Extender
code_examples.description: Full production-ready extender business rule that manages multiple RestFast endpoints via control table with automatic logging and error handling
code_examples.use_case: Automated ETL loads from REST APIs with incremental date tracking, control table management, and execution logging
key_features: Executes multiple RestFast endpoints from control table
Comprehensive execution logging to audit table
Error handling with individual endpoint isolation
database_objects: XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL - Control table with LoadId, EndPoint, TargetTable, ReferenceDate, ReferenceColumn, Enable, LoadType
XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_LOG - Audit log table with LoadId, LoadType, TargetTable, ExecutionStart, ExecutionEnd, Records, LoadStatus, ErrorMessage, ExecutedBy, ReferenceDate

main_functions.name: Main
main_functions.signature: Public Function Main(ByVal si As SessionInfo, ByVal globals As BRGlobals, ByVal api As Object, ByVal args As ExtenderArgs) As Object
main_functions.description: Entry point - handles ExtenderFunctionType.ExecuteDataMgmtBusinessRuleStep with p_function parameter

main_functions.name: ExecuteAllRestFastRequests
main_functions.signature: Private Sub ExecuteAllRestFastRequests(ByVal si As SessionInfo)
main_functions.description: Loops through all enabled endpoints in control table and executes each one, with individual error handling
features: Continues on error (doesn't fail entire batch)

main_functions.name: ExecuteRestFastRequest
main_functions.signature: Private Function ExecuteRestFastRequest(ByVal si As SessionInfo, ByVal requestName As String) As Object
main_functions.description: Executes a single RestFast request with dynamic variables and updates control table
features: Calculates from/to dates based on ReferenceDate

main_functions.name: LogExecution
main_functions.signature: Private Sub LogExecution(si, requestName, targetTable, loadType, executionStart, executionEnd, recordCount, loadStatus, errorMessage, referenceDate)
main_functions.description: Logs execution details to XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_LOG audit table

important_patterns.code:
Dim customVars As New Dictionary(Of String, String)()
customVars("from") = fromDate
customVars("to") = toDate
request.PopulateTable(si, customVars)
important_patterns.why: NEVER modify request.variables directly - always create separate dictionary and pass as parameter

important_patterns.code:
Dim toDate As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss")
Dim fromDate As String = currentDateTime.Date.ToString("yyyyMMdd") & "000000"
Dim defaultFromDate As String = New DateTime(currentDateTime.Year, currentDateTime.Month, 1).ToString("yyyyMMdd") & "000000"
important_patterns.why: Consistent date format (yyyyMMddHHmmss) for API compatibility

important_patterns.code:
Dim newReferenceDate As String = currentDateTime.Date.ToString("yyyyMMdd") & "000000"
Dim updateQuery As String = $"UPDATE XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL SET ReferenceDate = '{newReferenceDate}' WHERE LoadId = {loadId}"
BRApi.Database.ExecuteSql(dbConn, updateQuery, False)
important_patterns.why: Prevents reprocessing same data if execution fails mid-way

important_patterns.code:
Dim recordCountBefore As Integer = 0
' ... execute PopulateTable ...
Dim recordCountAfter As Integer = 0
recordCount = recordCountAfter  ' Since PopulateTable uses 'replace'
important_patterns.why: Track actual records loaded for audit and monitoring

important_patterns.code:
executionStart = DateTime.Now
Try
  ' ... execution logic ...
  executionEnd = DateTime.Now
  loadStatus = "OK"
  Me.LogExecution(...)
Catch ex As Exception
  executionEnd = DateTime.Now
  loadStatus = "ERROR"
  Me.LogExecution(..., ex.Message, ...)
  Throw
End Try
important_patterns.why: Ensure all executions are logged regardless of success/failure

full_code_sections.imports:
Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.Data
Imports Workspace.RESTAPIFramework.RESTAPIRequestManager.Classes
full_code_sections.main_entry_point:
Public Function Main(ByVal si As SessionInfo, ByVal globals As BRGlobals, ByVal api As Object, ByVal args As ExtenderArgs) As Object
    Try
        Select Case args.FunctionType
            Case Is = ExtenderFunctionType.ExecuteDataMgmtBusinessRuleStep
                Dim functionName As String = args.NameValuePairs.XFGetValue("p_function")
                If functionName.XFEqualsIgnoreCase("ExecuteRestFastRequest") Then
                    Me.ExecuteAllRestFastRequests(si)
                    Return Nothing
                End If
        End Select
        Return Nothing
    Catch ex As Exception
        Throw ErrorHandler.LogWrite(si, New XFException(si, ex))
    End Try
End Function
full_code_sections.execute_all_pattern:
Private Sub ExecuteAllRestFastRequests(ByVal si As SessionInfo)
    ' Get enabled endpoints
    Dim query As String = "SELECT EndPoint FROM XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL WHERE Enable = 1 ORDER BY LoadId"
    Dim dtEndpoints As DataTable = BRApi.Database.GetDataTable(dbConn, query, Nothing, Nothing, False)
    
    ' Loop through each endpoint
    Dim successCount As Integer = 0
    Dim failCount As Integer = 0
    For Each row As DataRow In dtEndpoints.Rows
        Try
            Me.ExecuteRestFastRequest(si, row("EndPoint").ToString())
            successCount += 1
        Catch ex As Exception
            failCount += 1
            ' Continue processing other endpoints
        End Try
    Next
End Sub
full_code_sections.execute_single_pattern:
Private Function ExecuteRestFastRequest(si As SessionInfo, requestName As String) As Object
    ' Calculate dates
    Dim toDate As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss")
    
    ' Get control table info
    Dim query As String = "SELECT LoadId, TargetTable, ReferenceDate, ReferenceColumn, LoadType FROM XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL..."
    Dim dtControl As DataTable = BRApi.Database.GetDataTable(dbConn, query...)
    
    ' Determine fromDate
    Dim fromDate As String = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(referenceDate), defaultFromDate, referenceDate)
    
    ' Update ReferenceDate BEFORE execution
    BRApi.Database.ExecuteSql(dbConn, "UPDATE XFC_STG_ETL_LOAD_CONTROL SET ReferenceDate = ...")
    
    ' Get RestFast request
    Dim utils As New Utils()
    Dim request As RESTAPIRequest = utils.GetSavedRequest(si, requestName)
    
    ' Build custom variables
    Dim customVars As New Dictionary(Of String, String)()
    If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(referenceColumn) Then
        customVars("from") = fromDate
        customVars("to") = toDate
    End If
    
    ' Execute
    request.PopulateTable(si, customVars)
    
    ' Log execution
    Me.LogExecution(...)
End Function

common_issues_and_solutions.issue: Variables not being replaced in endpoint
common_issues_and_solutions.solution: Ensure you're passing customVars as parameter to PopulateTable, not modifying request.variables
Check that targetTable matches the actual table name in database. Use recordCountAfter since PopulateTable uses 'replace' mode
Verify LoadId is correctly retrieved from control table before UPDATE query

common_issues_and_solutions.issue: One endpoint failure stops all endpoints
common_issues_and_solutions.solution: ExecuteAllRestFastRequests has Try-Catch inside loop to continue processing on individual failures

best_practices: Always log extensively - this code has detailed logging at each step
Update ReferenceDate BEFORE execution to prevent duplicate processing
Use separate Try-Catch for PopulateTable to get detailed error info
Log both successful and failed executions to audit table
Check for predefined variables in request to avoid conflicts
Use newReferenceDate as start of current day (not current timestamp) for cleaner date boundaries
